arguments.suggestions: To meet your $150 savings target, I recommend the following cuts: 1) Reduce restaurant spending by $80 (from $150 to $70) by cooking at home more often and limiting dining out to special occasions. 2) Cut meal delivery by $50 (from $95 to $45) by meal prepping on weekends and reducing convenience orders. 3) Reduce coffee expenses by $20 (from $80 to $60) by making coffee at home most days and only buying coffee out occasionally. These three changes total $150 in savings and focus on discretionary food-related spending that can be replaced with more budget-friendly alternatives without impacting your health, fitness, or essential services.

1. Cancel streaming subscription ($45 cut) - saves the full amount, entertainment is discretionary. 2. Reduce coffee spending ($50 cut) - cut from $80 to $30 by brewing at home 2-3x per week. 3. Reduce restaurant spending ($55 cut) - cut from $150 to $95 by dining out 1 fewer time per week.
